jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at BEL
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BEL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About BEL:
BEL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL!
